question: The chart shows the distribution of energy use by source. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Other accounts for a larger share of energy use than all the other sources combined.
options.B: Hydroelectric accounts for a larger share of energy use than Renewables.
options.C: Nuclear uses more energy than Hydroelectric.
options.D: Nuclear and Renewables together make up a larger share of energy use than Other.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Other: 40%; Hydroelectric: 25%; Fossil Fuels: 15%; Nuclear: 10%; Renewables: 10%.
